name: Christian Ferry, Campaign Manager, Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: FWD: ALERT: What the White House just said...
body:
It's time to start imagining an Obama-free White House. Friend, did you see the email I sent last night?

If not, please read below to find out what the White House said about Senator Graham yesterday. Afterwards I hope you will **[stand with the campaign by making an instant online contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28378912:27242597972:m:1:877327319:805BE5074D8DAA86BA13C96D5A582340:r)**.

Thanks for your support.

-Christian

* * *
| |

---
---
|
_**"It's hard for me to imagine both a Graham White House and what a Graham White House would be without a first lady."**_
\- Josh Earnest, White House Press Secretary
Thursday, June 11, 2015
Friend, you read that correctly. **Those were the exact words from the White House Press Secretary today.**

Instead of focusing on the critical issues facing our nation like national security and foreign policy, the Obama Administration is focusing elsewhere, and now **they've set their sights on taking down Senator Graham's campaign**.

**Friend, let's imagine a White House without Barack Obama**. A White House without a president who leads from behind, who doesn't stand up for our allies, who doesn't listen to his military commanders.

Now let's imagine a White House with a Commander-in-Chief ready on day one, where our president is respected by our allies and feared by our enemies. **That is what a Lindsey Graham White House will look like**.

**It's time to start imagining an Obama-free White House and that begins when Senator Graham becomes president.

[But he can only get there if we have YOUR immediate support. Won't you please follow this link to support our campaign by making an instant online contribution?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28378912:27242597972:m:1:877327319:805BE5074D8DAA86BA13C96D5A582340:r)**

The Obama Administration would rather point fingers than discuss their own failed policies and it is time to put an end to it. **If you are sick and tired of the Obama Administration's smoke screen tactics, then we need your help right now.**

**[Please stand with Senator Graham by making an immediate donation to our campaign today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28378912:27242597972:m:1:877327319:805BE5074D8DAA86BA13C96D5A582340:r)**.

Sincerely,

Christian Ferry
Campaign Manager
Lindsey Graham 2016

P.S. The Obama Administration loves to distract from the real problems at hand. We have suffered 6 years under Obama's direction and it is time to begin imagining an Obama-free White House. **[If you stand with Lindsey then follow this link to make an immediate contribution.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28378912:27242597972:m:1:877327319:805BE5074D8DAA86BA13C96D5A582340:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28378912:27242597972:m:1:877327319:805BE5074D8DAA86BA13C96D5A582340:r) |

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015.

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: This would mean so much
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Help me launch this campaign. |
Friend --

Before I go on stage tomorrow to officially launch this campaign, I want to know who's standing with me at the very beginning of this journey.

It would mean so much to me for you to be a part of that group by becoming a Launch Donor before tonight’s deadline.

**Chip in $1 or more by midnight tonight, and be one of the people with me at the start:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/launch-donor/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI4MzA1MDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMTQ1MjM3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I hope you're as ready to go as I am!

Hillary

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI4MzA1MDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMTQ1MjM3S0&mt=1&rt=0) | | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI4MzA1MDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMTQ1MjM3S0&mt=1&rt=0).
Hillary for America, PO Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI4MzA1MDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMTQ1MjM3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: MarcoRubio.com
subject: It's Here - Shop Now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,
We just launched the official Marco Rubio for
President Campaign Store! For our launch, we're featuring the
Official Marco Polo, available in red, white, and blue.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42483990:17528209894:m:3:1349778030:A08036E907158D2D68D615514DBA1E15:r
All of our products are made in the USA and
shipping is free for all orders. Click here to visit the store
and start shopping now.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42483991:17528209894:m:3:1349778030:A08036E907158D2D68D615514DBA1E15:r

Ordering an item from our store helps the
campaign twice! First you're supporting the campaign with a
donation and second, wearing your new gear is a great way to
start conversations about Marco with your friends, family, and
neighbors.
Visit the store today!
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42483991:17528209894:m:3:1349778030:A08036E907158D2D68D615514DBA1E15:r

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Before tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Help me launch this campaign. |
Friend --

When I take the stage tomorrow to announce my plans for this campaign and for our country, I'll be grateful for the people who stepped up to support me this week.

It's not just about the money, although I know your $1 will be put to good use. It's about having your name on the record as a Launch Donor -- someone who's standing with me and with this organization at this crucial moment, and who's invested in what we're building together.

**Are you with me? Contribute $1 before tomorrow:****[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/launch-donor/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI4MzM0MzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMTgzMzk2S0&mt=1&rt=0)** I'm so thrilled to be able to start this next phase with you.

Thank you,

Hillary [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI4MzM0MzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMTgzMzk2S0&mt=1&rt=0) | | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI4MzM0MzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMTgzMzk2S0&mt=1&rt=0).
Hillary for America, PO Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI4MzM0MzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgxMTgzMzk2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
